name: Webcentral Group Limited
summary: Webcentral Group Limited provides digital services for small and medium businesses. It offers domain names, website hosting, website design, email and office apps, online marketing, website security, and social media ads under the Netregistry, Melbourne IT, and Domainz brands; and digital marketing agency services, such as web design and development, search engine optimization, social media marketing, content production, pay-per-click advertising, and digital reputation management under the WME brand. The company was formerly known as ARQ Group Limited and changed its name to Webcentral Group Limited in June 2020. Webcentral Group Limited was founded in 1996 and is based in Melbourne, Australia.
